utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You mean whenever Monica and Chandler where like you know doing laundry or going grocery shopping or ... Oh !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All that time Monica spent on the phone with sad Linda from camp !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Uh ... huh , doing it . Doing it . Phone doing it .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I can not believe it !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I mean I think it is great !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: She might be able to do better .

emotion_cause.span: 10_Phoebe just found out about Monica and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Phoebe just found out about Monica and Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 10_Phoebe just found out about Monica and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You mean how they are friends and nothing more ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , so now they know that you know and they do not know that Rachel knows ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_so now they know that you know and they do not know that Rachel knows ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It does not matter who knows what .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Now , enough of us know that we can just tell them that we know !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Then all the lying and the secrets would finally be over !

emotion_cause.span: 17_Then all the lying and the secrets would finally be over !
